---
title: "Welcome to the TOPIC Tutorial!"
---

THIS IS YOUR HOME PAGE FILE. DO NOT RENAME OR DELETE THIS FILE.


## Tutorial Overview

This **self-paced tutorial** is intended to take X hours to complete.

The tutorial is split into the following sections:

1.  [**topic-one**]() talks about the first topic
2.  [**topic-two**]() discusses the second topic
3. ...etc


::: {.callout-warning title="Recommended Software"}
This tutorial assumes you have the following software installed:

-   SOME SOFTWARE + LINK HERE

:::



::: {.callout-tip title="Support the LMU Open Science Center!"}

**Like this tutorial? Be sure to give [the repository]({{< meta repo-url >}}) a star and [follow us on GitHub](https://github.com/lmu-osc)!**
:::
